Package com.myscript.iink

Interface IEditorListener

public interface IEditorListener
The listener interface for receiving editor events.
See Also:
  • Editor.addListener(IEditorListener)
  • Editor.removeListener(IEditorListener)

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    activeBlockChanged(@NotNull Editor editor, @NotNull String blockId)
    Invoked when the active block has changed.
    void
    contentChanged(@NotNull Editor editor, @NotNull String[] blockIds)
    Invoked when the content has changed.
    default void
    contentChanged2(@NotNull Editor editor, @NotNull String[] addedBlockIds, @NotNull String[] removedBlockIds, @NotNull String[] updatedBlockIds)
    Invoked when the content has changed, with detailed information.
    void
    onError(@NotNull Editor editor, @NotNull String blockId, @NotNull EditorError err, @NotNull String message)
    Invoked when an error has occurred.
    void
    partChanged(@NotNull Editor editor)
    Invoked when the part associated with the listened editor has changed.
    void
    partChanging(@NotNull Editor editor, @Nullable ContentPart oldPart, @Nullable ContentPart newPart)
    Invoked when the part associated with the listened editor is about to change.
    void
    selectionChanged(@NotNull Editor editor)
    Invoked when the selection has changed.

  • Method Details

    • partChanging

      void partChanging(@NotNull @NotNull Editor editor, @Nullable @Nullable ContentPart oldPart, @Nullable @Nullable ContentPart newPart)
      Invoked when the part associated with the listened editor is about to change.
      Parameters:
      editor - the editor.
      oldPart - the old part.
      newPart - the new part.
      See Also:
      • Editor.setPart(ContentPart)

    • partChanged

      void partChanged(@NotNull @NotNull Editor editor)
      Invoked when the part associated with the listened editor has changed.
      Parameters:
      editor - the editor.
      See Also:
      • Editor.setPart(ContentPart)

    • contentChanged

      void contentChanged(@NotNull @NotNull Editor editor, @NotNull @NotNull String[] blockIds)
      Invoked when the content has changed.
      Parameters:
      editor - the editor.
      blockIds - the identifiers of the modified blocks.

    • contentChanged2

      default void contentChanged2(@NotNull @NotNull Editor editor, @NotNull @NotNull String[] addedBlockIds, @NotNull @NotNull String[] removedBlockIds, @NotNull @NotNull String[] updatedBlockIds)
      Invoked when the content has changed, with detailed information.

      Note: only supported for "Raw Content" parts.

      Parameters:
      editor - the editor.
      addedBlockIds - the identifiers of the added blocks.
      removedBlockIds - the identifiers of the removed blocks.
      updatedBlockIds - the identifiers of the updated blocks.
      Since:
      4.2

    • onError

      void onError(@NotNull @NotNull Editor editor, @NotNull @NotNull String blockId, @NotNull @NotNull EditorError err, @NotNull @NotNull String message)
      Invoked when an error has occurred.
      Parameters:
      editor - the editor.
      blockId - the identifier of the block on which this error has occurred.
      err - the error code corresponding to the error.
      message - the error message.
      Since:
      1.5

    • selectionChanged

      void selectionChanged(@NotNull @NotNull Editor editor)
      Invoked when the selection has changed. The selection can be retrieved by calling getSelection on the editor.
      Parameters:
      editor - the editor.
      Since:
      2.0

    • activeBlockChanged

      void activeBlockChanged(@NotNull @NotNull Editor editor, @NotNull @NotNull String blockId)
      Invoked when the active block has changed. The active block is usually the last modified text block.
      Parameters:
      editor - the editor.
      blockId - the identifier of the active block.
      Since:
      1.1
